news.headline: Rocket Cos. receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade for improving technical performance. Will growth trend persist?
news.summary: Rocket Companies has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. Investors are now questioning whether this improvement will be sustained in the future.

news.headline: Hasbro's stock sees improved performance, earns upgrade to IBD Relative Strength Rating. (Characters: 76)
news.summary: Toy company Hasbro has seen a positive rise in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade indicates the company's improving performance relative to the overall market. The specific numerical improvement in the rating was not disclosed, but it shows that Hasbro is making positive strides in its financial standing. This news reflects the company's growing strength in the market and its ability to outperform its competitors.

news.headline: Use checklists to navigate market corrections the 'Smart' way. Prioritize safety with strategies similar to pilots.
news.summary: Similar to how pilots rely on a preflight checklist to ensure safety, employing a trading checklist can safeguard one during market corrections. This tool assists in staying on course. Remember, proper preparation is key.

news.headline: Moderna stock surges 20% this week as execs buy shares on open market, despite mixed news.
news.summary: Moderna's stock has seen a significant increase of over 20% this week following revelations from regulatory filings that several company executives made open market share purchases. Despite some mixed news, the surge in Moderna's stock has been notable, with a 15% increase reported for the week.

news.headline: White House crypto summit discusses Trump's new strategic bitcoin reserve, President to speak.
news.summary: Details on the new strategic bitcoin reserve were unveiled at the White House crypto summit, where President Trump is set to address the matter. The summit revealed key information about the reserve, indicating a significant strategic move in the cryptocurrency sphere. President Trump's speech at the event is highly anticipated, showcasing the government's interest and involvement in the growing crypto market. This development underscores the increasing importance of digital assets like bitcoin on a national scale.

news.headline: AMREP's Q3 FY25 net income $717K vs. $92K in FY24; 9-month net income $8.82M vs. $2.55M in FY24; Q3 FY25 revenue $7.52M vs. $12.69M in FY24.
news.summary: In Havertown, Pennsylvania, financial updates were released by AMREP Corporation (NYSE: AXR) on March 07, 2025. For the fiscal third quarter that ended on January 31, 2025, the company disclosed a net income of $717,000, equivalent to $0.13 per diluted share. This marks a substantial increase from the previous year's third quarter figures where net income was reported at $92,000, or $0.02 per diluted share. Over the first nine months of 2025, AMREP achieved a net income of $8,823,000, translating to $1.64 per diluted share. This stands in contrast to the same period in 2024 where net income was $2,546,000, or $0.48 per diluted share. The revenues for the third quarter of 2025 were detailed at $7,520,000, with total revenues for the first nine months amounting to $38,516,000. In comparison, the revenues for the third quarter and first nine months of 2024 were $12,689,000 and $31,833,000 respectively.

news.headline: CGTN America & CCTV UN to present "China in Springtime - Sharing Opportunities with the World" at University of Chicago, showcasing new initiatives.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, CGTN America & CCTV UN announced the release of "China in Springtime – Sharing Opportunities with the World." The event, hosted by the China Media Group at the Polsky Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation at the University of Chicago, aims to showcase opportunities for collaboration.

news.headline: Guayakí Yerba Mate named finalist for 2025 NEXTY Award for innovation in yerba mate. Energizing beverage aisles.
news.summary: A company leading the way in the yerba mate industry has been selected as a finalist for the 2025 NEXTY Award for their innovative approach. Guayakí Yerba Mate, based in Sebastopol, Calif. and Venice, Calif., is renowned for their organic beverages and commitment to sustainability. The company's efforts have caught the attention of the industry, recognizing their unique contributions. The recognition comes as a result of Guayakí's groundbreaking work in revitalizing the beverage sector, setting them apart as a frontrunner in the field. This acknowledgment highlights the impact of their initiatives in driving forward positive change within the industry.

news.headline: Sreela Venkataratnam appointed as Chief Accounting Officer for Rivian with 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: Rivian Automotive, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Sreela Venkataratnam as the Chief Accounting Officer. As of March 10, she assumed this role at Rivian and is tasked with managing various accounting functions. Venkataratnam will supervise financial reporting, tax and trade activities, internal controls and compliance, finance transformation, and manufacturing controllership. With an extensive background of more than 25 years, she brings a wealth of experience to her new position at Rivian.

news.headline: Fortive Corp to present at J.P. Morgan 2025 Industrials Conference with CEO and COO, on Mar 13th at 8:15 AM ET. Webcast on fortive.com.
news.summary: Fortive Corporation revealed that James A. Lico, President and CEO, along with Olumide Soroye, President and CEO of Intelligent Operating Solutions and Advanced Healthcare Solutions, are scheduled to speak at the J.P. Morgan 2025 Industrials Conference on March 13, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. ET (5:15 a.m. PT). The presentation can be accessed via a live webcast on www.fortive.com. Fortive is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FTV.

news.headline: Meritage reports 2024 financial results, outlook shows accelerating earnings growth; based in Michigan, OTCQX: MHGU.
news.summary: Meritage Hospitality Group Inc., a leading franchise restaurant operator based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, has announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on December 29, 2024. The company is listed on OTCQX as MHGU. The report covers their performance in 2024, showcasing their position as one of the top operators in the nation.

news.headline: Bank of America to redeem CAD400,000,000 Floating Rate Senior Notes due March 2026; redemption to occur on March 16, 2025.
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C. on March 7, 2025, Bank of America Corporation made a public statement regarding the redemption of all outstanding CAD400,000,000 principal amount in Floating Rate Senior Notes, which are due in March 2026. The Notes can be identified by their CUSIP No. 060505GE8 and ISIN No. CA060505GE87. The redemption is scheduled for March 16, 2025.

news.headline: NI Holdings, Inc. reported their results for the year ending December 31, 2024.
news.summary: Today, in Fargo, North Dakota, NI Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: NODK) revealed its financial results for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: CoreCivic appoints Dawn Smith, Stacey Tank, and Nina Tran to its Board of Directors, expanding from 11 to 14 members.
news.summary: CoreCivic, Inc. (NYSE: CXW) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, revealed that starting on March 17, 2025, Dawn Smith, Stacey Tank, and Nina Tran will join the Company's Board of Directors as independent members. This move will increase the Board's size from eleven to fourteen directors, with thirteen of them confirmed by the Board as independent. The new additions are anticipated to participate in different board committees in the upcoming period.

news.headline: Janus Intl pays down $40M debt, uses cash on hand against first lien term loan facility.
news.summary: Temple, Georgia - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a prominent supplier of access control technologies and building solutions for self-storage and other commercial sectors, recently disclosed a significant debt repayment. The company utilized cash reserves to pay off $40 million in debt, targeting their first lien term loan facility. With a focus on capital optimization, this move reflects Janus' robust cash flow generation from their operations. This strategic payment underscores the company's financial prudence and commitment to strengthening its balance sheet.

news.headline: Primaris REIT declares $0.0717 per unit distribution for March 2025, totaling $0.86 annually, payable on April 15.
news.summary: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: PMZ.UN) shared that its Board of Trustees has approved a monthly distribution of $0.0717 per unit for March 2025, totaling $0.86 annually. This distribution will be given to unitholders recorded on March 31, 2025, and will be disbursed on April 15, 2025. Primaris is recognized as Canada's sole enclosed shopping center-focused REIT.

news.headline: Fairfax India Holdings Corp reveals new executive appointments. #corporate #news
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.8%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous month. The number of jobless individuals now stands at 12.3 million, with the youth demographic being disproportionately affected. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job creation, with only 150,000 new jobs added compared to the expected 300,000. The economic outlook remains uncertain as the country grapples with the ongoing challenges in the job market.

news.headline: Antonia Saint Dunbar advocates for women's health in manufacturing and leads innovative change in footwear.
news.summary: Antonia Saint Dunbar, the CEO and Founder of Antonia Saint NY, is spearheading a revolution in women's footwear to empower women globally. With a focus on comfort, health, and innovation, Antonia Saint NY is disrupting the industry. On March 7, 2025, in celebration of International Women's Day, this groundbreaking initiative is making waves. This stride towards empowering women worldwide showcases the importance of female leadership in creating positive change.

news.headline: CIBL, Inc. reports 7.5% increase in Q4 2024 revenues to $517,000 from $481,000 the previous year.
news.summary: CIBL, Inc. (OTC Pink: CIBY) based in Reno, Nevada, has released unaudited results for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company, which includes Bretton Woods Telephone Company and World Surfer, Inc., offering broadband and communication services in Northern New Hampshire, reported a revenue increase of 7.5%. In the fourth quarter of 2024, New Hampshire Operations generated $517,000 in revenue, up from $481,000 in the same period the prior year.

news.headline: Fairfax Financial appoints Amy Sherk as new CFO starting March 10, 2025, Jennifer Allen becomes Chief Business Officer.
news.summary: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited has announced the appointment of Amy Sherk as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 10, 2025. Jennifer Allen, who has served as the CFO since 2019 and has been part of Fairfax for 19 years, will take on the role of Chief Business Officer. Fairfax is listed on both TSX as FFH and FFH.U. This change in leadership signifies a strategic transition within the company.

news.headline: Mittul Mehta, CIO & Head of Tevogen.AI at Tevogen Bio, spoke at AI panel by Proskauer on March 6, 2025 in NYC.
news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey, on March 7, 2025, Mittul Mehta, Chief Information Officer & Head of Tevogen.AI at Tevogen Bio, participated in a panel discussion on AI hosted by Proskauer. The event titled "Attuned AI: Shaping AI to Empower Your Industry" took place in New York City on March 6, 2025. Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., listed on Nasdaq as TVGN, is a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company.

news.headline: Trump: The CHIPS act is a waste of money.
Stock market experiences biggest weekly plunge in months amid concerns over tariffs impact on largest trading partners.
news.summary: Concerns are rising among investors regarding the impact of tariffs on the economic growth of America's top trading allies. The uncertainty surrounding these tariffs has led to apprehension in the investment community, as market fluctuations and potential disruptions loom large. These concerns are further fueled by the escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and its major trading partners, with tariffs affecting billions of dollars worth of goods. As a result, investors are closely monitoring the situation and its potential implications on global trade and economic stability.

news.headline: Codexis granted equity awards to two new employees - 10,000 options to buy shares and 5,000 restricted stock units.
news.summary: Codexis, Inc., headquartered in Redwood City, California, revealed today the approval of equity grants for two new employees by the Compensation Committee of Codexis’ Board of Directors. Each employee was granted equity awards, including options to buy 10,000 shares of Codexis common stock and 5,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of the Company’s 2024 Inducement Plan. This move aims to attract and retain talent essential for the company’s enzymatic solutions utilized in efficient and scalable therapeutics manufacturing.

news.headline: Ultralife Corp (NASDAQ: ULBI) filed Form 12b-25 notifying late filing of Annual Report for 2024.
news.summary: Ultralife Corporation, based in Newark, New York, reported on March  07, 2025, that it has submitted a Form 12b-25 to the Securities and Exchange Commission due to a delay in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2024. The company is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol ULBI.

news.headline: Trump ends remarks at White House Crypto Summit.
zSpace reschedules earnings call to March 28, 2025, 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, on March 07, 2025, zSpace (Nasdaq: ZSPC), a prominent provider of augmented and virtual reality products for educational purposes, disclosed that it had rescheduled its fourth quarter and full year 2024 earnings conference call and webcast. The call is now set to take place on Friday, March 28, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Ex-Congressman Holding appointed to Trump Media Board.
Ocular Therapeutix granted inducement awards to one new employee under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, Ocular Therapeutix, Inc. revealed that it granted inducement awards to a recently recruited employee. This step was taken to facilitate the person's joining the company and falls under Ocular's 2019 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Ocular is a biopharmaceutical firm headquartered in Bedford, Mass., listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OCUL.

news.headline: Stagwell Inc. (STGW) grants 69,170 restricted stock units to 9 new employees. Equity inducement awards reported.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Stagwell Inc. disclosed the issuance of equity inducement awards. The Company awarded a sum of 69,170 restricted stock units to incoming nine staff members. These stock units symbolize the entitlement to...

news.headline: WOW! Inc. to reveal Q4 2024 results on March 14, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET via webcast & call. NYSE: WOW.
news.summary: In Englewood, Colorado, on March 7, 2025, WOW! Internet, TV & Phone (NYSE: WOW) revealed plans to hold a webcast and conference call on March 14, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET. This leading U.S. broadband provider will use the event to delve into their financial and operating performance for the public.

news.headline: Kenvue to present new clinical data at AAD Annual Meeting showcasing skincare innovations at the Orlando Convention Center.
news.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) is set to unveil recent clinical data at the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting from March 7-11, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. The findings from 14 clinical studies will showcase Kenvue's groundbreaking research in the Skin Health & Beauty sector. This presentation will highlight how their renowned brands are integrating cutting-edge science to influence the future of the industry. This event will take place at the Orlando Convention Center, demonstrating Kenvue's commitment to innovation and advancement in the field.

news.headline: Oncternal Therapeutics plans to delist from Nasdaq and deregister with SEC voluntarily on March 17, 2025 after stock suspension.
news.summary: San Diego-based Oncternal Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ONCT) revealed its plans to submit a Form 25 Notification of Delisting to the Securities and Exchange Commission on March 17, 2025. This action will result in the removal of Oncternal's securities from Nasdaq listing and registration. Following this delisting, the company intends to deregister with the SEC. The suspension of Oncternal's common stock trading on Nasdaq occurred on December 3, 2024. Despite Nasdaq's notification of an impending Form 25 filing, Oncternal has chosen to voluntarily submit it to facilitate the filing of a Form 15 for SEC deregistration.

news.headline: PDF Solutions (NASDAQ: PDFS) acquires secureWISE, LLC, a popular remote connectivity solution in semiconductor industry.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, PDF Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: PDFS) completed the acquisition of secureWISE, LLC from Telit IOT Solutions Inc. The acquisition adds a prominent secure, remote connectivity solution in the semiconductor manufacturing equipment sector to PDF Solutions' portfolio.

news.headline: Brilliant Earth to join UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference in New York, a leader in ethically sourced jewelry.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Brilliant Earth Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRLT), a renowned global provider of ethically sourced fine jewelry, disclosed its involvement in the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference at the Lotte New York Palace in New York City. Brilliant Earth is recognized for its innovative approach to jewelry production with a focus on ethical sourcing practices.

news.headline: Rail Vision Ltd. notified by Nasdaq for not meeting minimum bid price rule of $1.00 for last 30 days.
news.summary: On March 6, 2025, Rail Vision Ltd. (Nasdaq: RVSN), a tech company in Israel, disclosed that it was notified by Nasdaq about its non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) due to its Ordinary Shares closing bid price staying under $1.00 per share for the past 30 consecutive business days. This situation puts the company at risk of being delisted from the stock exchange. Rail Vision Ltd. focuses on enhancing railway safety and the data market with its innovative technology.

news.headline: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) to attend investor conferences on March 11 and March 18, with CFO and chief services officer presenting.
news.summary: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE: MA) disclosed its involvement in upcoming investor events today. On Tuesday, March 11, Sachin Mehra, CFO, will virtually present at the Wolfe FinTech Forum in New York, NY. The presentation is scheduled for 12:20 p.m. Eastern Time with an expected duration of 35 minutes. Furthermore, on March 18, Craig Vosburg, Chief Services Officer, will present at the BofA Electronic Payments Symposium in New York.

news.headline: Market recovers slightly on Powell's comments, yet S&P 500 records its weakest week of 2025.
Home prices rose in February but at a slower rate than previous months, as per Homes.com report analysis.
news.summary: A report by Homes.com, a top online residential marketplace owned by CoStar Group, analyzed February housing prices, showing a continued increase but at a decelerated pace compared to previous months. This moderation in price growth has implications for potential homebuyers. The report also highlighted regions experiencing the highest rates of price appreciation. The analysis provides valuable insights into the current trends in the housing market.

news.headline: Innocan Pharma closes debenture unit offer to shareholder Tamar Innovest Limited, as announced on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Innocan Pharma Corporation (CSE: INNO) (FSE: IP4) (OTC: INNPF), based in Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, AB, shared on March 7, 2025, that it successfully completed a non-brokered private placement offering of a debenture unit. The Company did not disclose the specific amount raised or further details.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack from Cleveland notes 2% inflation is distant; rates to stay same. Job market strong but inflation uneven.
news.summary: Cleveland Fed President Beth Hammack recently indicated that the Federal Reserve is anticipated to maintain its current interest rate policy in the near future. This decision stems from ongoing evaluations of inflation patterns and labor market conditions. Despite acknowledging progress, Hammack stressed the necessity for patience, noting that inflation has yet to consistently meet the 2% target. Following recent policy talks, the Federal Reserve hinted at keeping interest rates steady for a prolonged duration. Hammack highlighted the strength of the job market but pointed out the uneven decrease in inflation. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Smiths Medical warns customers of smaller-than-expected sizes in 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, and 3.5mm Intubation Endotracheal Tubes.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Smiths Medical released an Urgent Medical Device Correction to inform worldwide customers about a possible problem with the 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, and 3.5 mm sizes of Intubation ORAL/NASAL Endotracheal Tube products being undersized. This issue impacts global customers and may pose risks during medical procedures.

news.headline: Trump plans 25% tariffs on Canada, Mexico; 20% on China, despite unstable economy. CPI up 3%, consumer spending down.
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump is set to implement tariffs on major trading partners, amidst economic concerns. Trump plans to impose 25% tariffs on imports from Canada and Mexico, and 20% tariffs on China, starting Tuesday. The economy is displaying signs of instability with declining consumer confidence, negative GDP forecasts, and unexpected drops in consumer spending in January. Inflation is on the rise, with Consumer Price Index data from January indicating a 3% increase, surpassing economist predictions. Tariffs may further impact inflation as they typically raise costs. Canada, Mexico, and China have expressed opposition to these measures.

news.headline: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE: VLO) will reveal Q1 2025 earnings on April 24, 2025, hosting a call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: San Antonio-based Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) has scheduled a conference call on April 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review the first quarter 2025 results, set to be disclosed earlier that day, and offer insights into company operations. To participate, individuals can access the webcast on Valero’s Investor Relations site at investorvalero.com. Valero Energy Corporation and its subsidiaries are integral players in the energy sector.

news.headline: Bitcoin’s market is still bullish, showing a rise of 20% in the last week. Stay tuned for more updates.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has fallen to 4.2%, reaching its lowest level since March 2020. This comes as the economy added 531,000 jobs in October, exceeding expectations and indicating strong growth in the labor market. Additionally, the number of long-term unemployed individuals declined by 473,000, pointing towards a positive trend in job recovery. The leisure and hospitality sector saw the largest gains, with 164,000 jobs added, while professional and business services, retail trade, and manufacturing also experienced notable increases. Overall, these figures suggest a promising outlook for the US economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: Intuitive Machines ends lunar mission after collecting data, ended mission at 12:15 am CST, carrying NASA tech.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Intuitive Machines landed in a Moon crater as part of its IM-2 mission, carrying NASA technology. After collecting valuable data, the mission was concluded early at 12:15 a.m. CST on Friday.

news.headline: SBA Head Loeffler: Small Business Administration open to crypto.
LAVA to consider strategic choices in business operations.
TopBuild Corp. reported Q4 sales of $1.31B, up 2.0% Y/Y, with mixed results and FY25 sales below consensus.
news.summary: TopBuild Corp (NYSE:BLD) saw its premarket trading lower following the report of fourth-quarter sales reaching $1.31 billion, aligning with market expectations. Sales surged by 2.0% year-over-year, primarily driven by a 6.6% increase in the Specialty Distribution segment. The Installation segment remained steady compared to the previous year. Despite this, the adjusted gross margin experienced a slight contraction to 29.9% from 30.4% in the same quarter last year. Conversely, the adjusted EBITDA Margin showed an improvement to 19.7% from 19.6%. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Home sales dropped by 4.6% in January.
